05-May     Community Transport —            TR-003   —     $89.00    $89.00   $44.50    $44.50
           GP appointment (Kenmore
           to Chapel Hill Medical Centre
           and return)
           Worker: Golden Years Transport

05-May     Community Transport —            TR-003   —     $89.00    $89.00   $44.50    $44.50
           GP appointment (Kenmore
           to Chapel Hill Medical Centre
           and return)

           NOTE: Two identical transport
           charges on 05 May. Provider advises
           one charge is for outbound journey
           and one for return journey. Golden
           Years published rate lists community
           transport as a return trip inclusive
           at $89.00 per trip. Billing of two
           separate $89.00 charges for one
           return trip may be a duplicate.
           Verify with provider.

19-May     Community Transport —            TR-003   —     $89.00    $89.00   $44.50    $44.50
           Specialist appointment
           (Kenmore to Wesley Hospital
           Auchenflower — cardiology review)
           Worker: Golden Years Transport

── AT-HM COMMITMENTS ────────────────────────────────────────────

AT-HM Ref:   ATHM-2026-0103
Item:        Grab rails — shower recess (supply and installation)
Approval:    3 April 2026
Tier:        Tier 2
Spend Limit: $1,200.00
Amount:      $987.50 (claimed and delivered April 2026)
Remaining:   $212.50
Expiry:      2 April 2027

AT-HM Ref:   ATHM-2026-0118
Item:        Ramp — front entry (supply and installation)
Approval:    28 April 2026
Tier:        Tier 2
Spend Limit: $2,500.00
Amount Claimed This Period: $2,500.00
Invoice:     Kenmore Mobility Solutions — INV-8841
             Dated: 22 May 2026

             QUERY: AT-HM Tier 2 spend limit
             for this item was $2,500.00 and
             the full $2,500.00 has been
             claimed in May. The invoice from
             Kenmore Mobility Solutions is
             dated 22 May 2026 but the
             approval date was 28 April 2026.
             No issue with timing. However
             the invoice amount should be
             verified — AT-HM Tier 2 claims
             are subject to a reasonable cost
             assessment. A front-entry ramp
             for $2,500 is at the upper end
             of typical. Recommend participant
             retain the invoice and obtain
             one comparative quote if possible.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Description:    April 2026 — Physiotherapy (PT-002, 28-Apr)
                Session duration recorded as 1.5hrs.
                Therapist timesheet confirmed 1.0hr only.
                Original charge: 1.5hrs × $178.00 = $267.00
                Corrected charge: 1.0hr × $178.00 = $178.00

                 contribution impact as Clinical stream
                 contribution is 0%)

DIRECT DEBIT NOTICE

BSB/Account: ••• ••• / •••• ••63

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PROVIDER NOTES
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1. Beverley's falls prevention programme continues. The physiotherapy
   team (Allied Care QLD) has noted good progress in balance
   assessment scores since March. Three sessions per month are
   planned for June.

2. The cardiology review on 19 May identified a medication
   adjustment. The nursing team has been briefed. Medication
   management visits will increase to weekly from June.
   This may trigger a care plan review to ensure Clinical
   stream allocation is sufficient for the additional nursing
   visits. Care manager Susan Tran will contact the family.

3. Golden Years published rates for May 2026:
   Personal care:     $102.00/hr (weekday)
                      $128.00/hr (weekend/public holiday)
   Domestic assist:    $74.50/hr
   Social support:     $79.00/hr
   Community transport: $89.00 per return trip (inclusive)
   Nursing (direct):  $148.00/hr
   Note: brokered allied health services are charged at
   the brokered provider's rate, which may differ from
   Golden Years' direct rates.

4. Beverley's care plan is due for its 6-monthly review in
   June 2026. The current plan was last reviewed December 2025.
   Susan Tran will schedule this with the family.

5. AT-HM front entry ramp (ATHM-2026-0118) has been installed.
   Beverley reports satisfaction with the installation.
   The $212.50 remaining on ATHM-2026-0103 (shower rails) will
   carry forward and expires April 2027.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COMPLAINTS AND FEEDBACK
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
To raise a concern with Golden Years Home Care:
Phone: (07) 3378 4400
Email: feedback@goldenyearshomecare.com.au

Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission:
Phone: 1800 951 822 | agedcarequality.gov.au

Your rights are protected under the Aged Care Act 2024.
